title: Will the Fed cut rates 0 times?
subtitle: Exactly 0 cuts
resolution_source: If the Fed cuts 0 times starting Jan 1, 2026 and before 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates before 2027?
subtitle: Cuts
resolution_source: If the Federal Reserve cuts its target federal funds rate range at least once between February 26, 2026 and December 31, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the rate of CPI inflation be above 3.7% for the year ending in June 2026?
subtitle: Above 3.7%
resolution_source: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than 3.7% in the twelve months ending June 2026 (as represented by the one-decimal place value reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics), then the

title: Will the rate of CPI inflation be above 3.8% for the year ending in June 2026?
subtitle: Above 3.8%
resolution_source: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than 3.8% in the twelve months ending June 2026 (as represented by the one-decimal place value reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics), then the

title: Will CPI rise more than -0.2% in June 2026?
subtitle: Above -0.2%
resolution_source: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than -0.2% (single-decimal) in June 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will there be a recession in 2027?
subtitle: Yes
resolution_source: If there are two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth in Q4 2026 through Q4 2027, according to the Bureau of Economic Analysis, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will **real GDP** increase by more than 2.5% in Q2 2026?
subtitle: Above 2.5%
resolution_source: If real GDP (as measured by the BEA’s seasonally adjusted and annualized Advance Estimate) increases by more than 2.5, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the WTI crude oil settlement price be above 77.99 USD/Bbl on Jul 17, 2026?
subtitle: Above $77.99
resolution_source: If the daily settlement price for WTI crude oil(September 2026 contract) on July 17, 2026 is above 77.99 USD/Bbl, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will **real GDP** increase by more than 2.0% in Q2 2026?
subtitle: Above 2.0%
resolution_source: If real GDP (as measured by the BEA’s seasonally adjusted and annualized Advance Estimate) increases by more than 2.0, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will **real GDP** increase by more than 1.5% in Q2 2026?
subtitle: Above 1.5%
resolution_source: If real GDP (as measured by the BEA’s seasonally adjusted and annualized Advance Estimate) increases by more than 1.5, then the market resolves to Yes.

resolution_source: If the close price of the 1-minute candlestick for silver on July 31, 2026 at 5:00 PM EDT is above 57.99 USD/t.oz, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Ethereum price at Jul 14, 2026 at 5pm EDT?
subtitle: $1,790 to 1,829.99
resolution_source: If the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' Ethereum Real-Time Index (ERTI) before 5 PM EDT is between 1790-1829.99 at 5 PM EDT on Jul 14, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will **real GDP** increase by more than 1.5% in Q3 2026?
subtitle: Above 1.5%
resolution_source: If real GDP (as measured by the BEA’s seasonally adjusted and annualized Advance Estimate) increases by more than 1.5, then the market resolves to Yes.
